title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO PAGHALUBAN, MUNICIPALITY OF BARCELONA, PROVINCE OF SORSOGON, TO PEÃA FRANCIA.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4685 / 53 OG No. 15, 4781 (August 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1664, June 20, 1957 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO PAGHALUBAN, MUNICIPALITY OF BARCELONA, PROVINCE OF SORSOGON, TO PEÃA FRANCIA.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the barrio of Paghaluban, Municipality of Barcelona, Province of Sorsogon, is changed to Peña Francia.

SEC. 2. This Act shall, take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 20, 1957.
